userStories.title: Create perfil emisor_token in perfil_entidad
acceptanceCriteria: Inspect perfil_entidad schema before inserting.
Insert codigo='emisor_token', nombre='Emisor de Criptoactivos (ART/EMT)', supervisor='CNMV'.
Use regimen_primario='MiCA' and activo=true, matching the casp row pattern.
Description must distinguish ART authorization by CNMV from EMT issuance by credit institutions or e-money institutions.
Do not create separate emisor_art or emisor_emt profiles in this sprint.
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM perfil_entidad WHERE codigo='emisor_token'"); echo "emisor_token perfil: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -eq 1 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Seed ART obligations for emisor_token (Title III MiCA)
acceptanceCriteria: Prerequisite: N-01 passed.
Load ART obligations for perfil_codigo='emisor_token' and norma_codigo='32023R1114'.
Required articles: art. 18, art. 19, art. 25, art. 35, art. 45.
Obligations must be verified=true with EUR-Lex source_url.
ART significant restriction art. 45 must use completeness='parcial'.
Other ART base obligations must use completeness='completa'.
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE perfil_codigo='emisor_token' AND norma_codigo='32023R1114'"); echo "emisor_token ART obligations: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 5 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Seed EMT obligations for emisor_token (Title IV MiCA)
acceptanceCriteria: Prerequisite: N-01 passed.
Load EMT obligations for perfil_codigo='emisor_token' and norma_codigo='32023R1114'.
Required articles: art. 48, art. 51, art. 55.
All EMT obligations must use completeness='parcial' because EMT issuance is conditional on credit institution or e-money institution status.
All EMT obligations must be verified=true with EUR-Lex source_url.
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE perfil_codigo='emisor_token'"); echo "emisor_token total obligations: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 8 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Document ART/EMT corpus gap and update MCP routing policy
acceptanceCriteria: Write docs/sprint-n-emisor-token-report.md documenting that ART/EMT supervisor corpus in documento_interpretativo is currently empty.
Do not invent BdE/CNMV documents for ART/EMT.
Extend MCP_TOOL_ROUTING_POLICY with emisor_token triggers and corpus gap warning.
Update obtener_obligaciones_perfil description and parameters to include emisor_token.
Add apps/api/tests/test_mcp_emisor_token_routing.py covering routing policy and tool description.
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/api/tests/test_mcp_emisor_token_routing.py -v 2>&1 | tail -10 | grep -E 'passed|PASSED' && test -f docs/sprint-n-emisor-token-report.md && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Update mcp_validation_suite - emisor_token checks
acceptanceCriteria: Add validation suite checks for emisor_token profile, >=8 obligations, all verified, required ART/EMT articles and completeness.
Add validation suite check that total obligacion_perfil is >=190.
Add deep contract audit checks for obtener_obligaciones_perfil('emisor_token').
Run both suites on VPS against full corpus; ok=true is required.
userStories.verificationCommand: docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm ops python mcp_validation_suite.py --read-only --base-url http://api:8000 2>&1 | grep 'ok=true' && docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm ops python mcp_deep_contract_audit.py 2>&1 | grep 'ok=true' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Final verification - Sprint N complete
acceptanceCriteria: N-01 through N-05 are complete.
Local full test suite passes with at least the current baseline of 3142 passed.
VPS /status reports api=ok and database=ok.
Alertmanager has 0 active alerts.
Branch feat/sprint-n-emisor-token is pushed.
docs/sprint-n-emisor-token-report.md is written.
docs/master-execution-roadmap.md records Sprint N complete.
Total obligacion_perfil is expected around 190+ with all rows verified.
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/ -q --basetemp .pytest-tmp 2>&1 | tail -3 | grep 'passed' && docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM perfil_entidad WHERE codigo='emisor_token'" | grep -E '^1$' && echo PASS || echo FAIL
